creator: jose@nobody.org
text:
Running "pppd" non-root brings up the message that pppd is not setuid
        root

Fix: 

Make "pppd" setuid root again?  Perhaps the install script is broken?
        Sorry, I'm not a good enough Unix person to know.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Type "pppd" as any user that isn't root
